heading: Organization
label: 153901 Organization
text: The National Yeomen (F) (in this chapter, the “corporation”) is a body corporate and politic in the District of Columbia.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15390136:139 (words before “for patriotic, historical, and educational purposes”).(words before “for patriotic, historical, and educational purposes”), .June 15, 1936, ch. 546, § 149 Stat. 1501This section is substituted for the source provision for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary and executed words.
